infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Tomo reads your sleep, heart rate, workouts, and activity data to track recovery and optimize training.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tomo uses the camera to record your training drills so you can review your form.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tomo accesses your photo library to set a profile photo and save drill recordings.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Tomo records audio with your training drill videos.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Tomo uses motion sensors to measure your jump height, sprint speed, agility, and balance during phone-based tests.

plugins.cameraPermission: Tomo uses the camera to record your training drills so you can review your form.
plugins.microphonePermission: Tomo records audio with your training drill videos.

plugins.photosPermission: Tomo accesses your photos to set a profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: Tomo uses the camera to take a profile photo.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Tomo reads your sleep, heart rate, workouts, and activity data to track recovery and optimize training.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Tomo does not write health data.
